title: Future Reveals ‘The Real Me’ With New Album: Stream It Now
imageAlt: Future Reveals ‘The Real Me’ With New Album: Stream It Now
keyPoints: Future Reveals ‘The Real Me’ With New Album: Stream It Now
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de cultura.

fullArticle:
Future has returned just in time to heat the summer up. The Atlanta rap dignitary released his The Real Me album on Friday (July 10), which serves as his first project since teaming up with Metro Boomin for a pair of collab efforts in 2024.

The album boasts 22 tracks in total and includes the previously released single “Radio.” If The Real Me tops the Billboard 200, it will be Future’s 12th time at the summit.

Even though he kept details of the album under wraps, Future set a high bar for the project, calling The Real Me the “album of the century” in a post to X in June.

2026 has still been a busy year for Future before releasing an album. Pluto ended his feud with Drake as the “Life Is Good” collaborators had a reunion on ICEMAN‘s “Ran to Atlanta” in Atlanta, which debuted at No. 2 on ...
